evals.name: create-new-codex-skill
evals.prompt: Create a new Codex skill named deployment-checklist in a temporary skills directory. The skill should scaffold a release checklist workflow, include eval templates, and generate Codex UI metadata.
evals.expected_output: A new benchmark-ready skill directory with SKILL.md, agents/openai.yaml, evals/, and validation notes.
expectations: The created skill directory contains SKILL.md and agents/openai.yaml.
The created skill directory contains evals/evals.json and evals/trigger_queries.json.

evals.name: improve-existing-skill
evals.prompt: Improve the sample skill at assets/fixtures/incident-summary-helper. Tighten its instructions, broaden its trigger description, and benchmark the revised version against the original snapshot baseline.
evals.expected_output: An updated skill plus a workspace iteration containing with_skill and baseline outputs, grading, and benchmark summaries.
expectations: The benchmark workspace includes benchmark.json and benchmark.md.
Both with_skill and baseline runs have outputs and grading artifacts.
The updated description mentions incident summaries, incident updates, or postmortems.

evals.name: optimize-triggering
evals.prompt: Run trigger-query evaluation for assets/fixtures/incident-summary-helper, propose a stronger description, and save both the trigger report and the suggested description.
evals.expected_output: A trigger evaluation report plus a suggested description that raises coverage for positive trigger queries.
expectations: The run writes a JSON trigger evaluation report.
The run writes a suggested description text file.
The suggested description explicitly tells Codex when to use the skill.
